## PROFESSIONAL PROFILE

Senior QA Engineer with 10+ years' specialization in enterprise HRIS, payroll, and financial systems testing. Deep expertise in mainframe COBOL-based platform modernization: architected testing strategy reducing legacy system costs by 50% while improving quality metrics from 8% to 2% defect escape rate. Led enterprise QA initiatives across 500+ clients (200K+ concurrent users, $2.5B+ annual transaction volume). Proven impact in test automation (PHP framework), structured QA processes, data integrity validation, and cross-functional team leadership. ISTQB-certified.

---

## WORK EXPERIENCE

### Senior QA Engineer - Enterprise Platforms | PayAsia by Deel
**January 2022 - April 2026** | Remote (APAC-friendly hours)

**Scope:** Enterprise HRIS/Payroll platform serving 500+ clients; 200K+ end-users; $2.5B+ annual payroll transactions

**Strategic Achievements:**

• **Automation Architecture & Scalability** — Designed PHP-based test automation framework (250+ test cases covering core payroll workflows). Reduced manual testing effort from 80 hours to 12 hours per release cycle (85% efficiency gain); enabled transition from monthly to bi-weekly release cadence supporting 3x faster feature delivery to customers.

• **Quality Metrics Transformation** — Established structured regression testing strategy and acceptance testing protocols. Achieved 95% test coverage and reduced defect escape rate from 8% (prior baseline) to 2% (current state); prevented estimated 34 post-release data integrity incidents affecting 500K+ employee records.

• **Cross-Functional QA Leadership** — Coordinated release cycles with development and product teams; established test case standards adopted across organization. Reduced average defect resolution time from 8 days to 2 days through collaborative QA/Dev framework; improved developer satisfaction by 18 points (engagement survey).

• **Data Accuracy Validation** — Owned regression testing for 5-module payroll system (200+ data fields); performed edge case validation for payroll calculations, deductions, and compliance workflows. Prevented 28 critical data loss incidents that would have affected payroll processing for 500K+ employees; maintained 99.95% data reconciliation accuracy.

### Software Test Analyst | FIS Global
**June 2016 - January 2022** | [Location] | Enterprise Financial Systems

**Scope:** Mainframe-based banking and financial systems; legacy COBOL platforms; enterprise client portfolios

**Specialization:** Legacy Credit Card Clearing Systems (7 years, COBOL on Mainframe)  
Platform criticality: Processes 50M+ annual transactions; core to payment ecosystem; mission-critical government compliance.

**Strategic Achievements:**

• **Legacy System Modernization Leadership** — Architected testing strategy for mainframe credit card clearing platform, transitioning from purely manual approach to 80% automated testing. Reduced legacy system testing costs by 50% annually while maintaining 99.99% system availability and zero fraud-related data loss incidents over 6-year tenure. Positioned legacy platform for continued strategic value.

• **Mainframe Specialization & Mentorship** — Became SME (Subject Matter Expert) in COBOL-based testing practices; mentored 4 junior QA engineers in mainframe testing approaches, data verification techniques, and batch processing validation. Established test documentation standards adopted across 3 enterprise client accounts; reduced new test case creation time by 45% through reusable templates.

• **Compliance & Risk Mitigation** — Led comprehensive PCI-DSS compliance testing for credit card clearing system; performed security and reliability validation across 5 interconnected modules. Prevented 12 potential data breach scenarios through rigorous edge-case and vulnerability testing; maintained zero compliance violations across 3 consecutive regulatory audits.

• **Performance & Reliability Testing** — Executed stress, scalability, and performance testing before 10 major platform releases. Detected and resolved 45 performance bottlenecks preventing 3 critical system outages that would have affected 200K+ cardholders; maintained consistent 99.99% uptime SLA.

• **Test Strategy & Release Management** — Created centralized test strategy documents and managed testing activities within release schedules. Communicated risks, defect priorities, and test progress to stakeholder teams (development, product, compliance); ensured alignment on quality gates before go-live.
